overall.description: A first-person perspective inside a futuristic cyberpunk metro train from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera pans through the train car showing passengers with cybernetic implants and neon green lighting, passing the 'GLEN NORTH' station while traveling through a dark urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car bathed in green neon light. Two passengers sit on a green bench seat while the train moves through a dark cyberpunk city, with tall glass buildings visible through the windows. Holographic advertisements glow on the walls as the train travels steadily.

events.description: train passes GLEN NORTH station platform with large red neon signage visible through the window

agents.ego_description: panning the camera left to reveal more of the train car and other passengers

notable_agents.action: passenger with distinctive white spiky hair and cybernetic implants sitting by the window

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'GLEN NORTH' on the station platform
metal support column in the train car

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the train car, revealing a passenger with white spiky cybernetic hair sitting by the window. The train passes the 'GLEN NORTH' station, identified by bright red neon signage on the platform. The interior remains consistently lit by green neon strips as the urban landscape streams past outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior focused on cybernetically enhanced passenger

events.description: player character extends their hand and touches the spiky haired passenger's cybernetic arm

agents.ego_description: reaching out to touch the cybernetic arm of the passenger with white spiky hair

notable_agents.action: passenger with white spiky hair and chrome cybernetic arm holding a tablet-like device

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the passenger with white spiky cybernetic implants who is examining a device with his chrome cybernetic arm. The player character reaches out and touches the passenger's arm. The train continues moving through the dark urban environment outside the left windows, with green neon lighting illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior looking down the length of the car

events.description: camera pans right and stabilizes looking down the central aisle of the train car

agents.ego_description: panning right to survey the train car and observe other passengers down the aisle

entered.detail: view down the entire length of the train car showing multiple sections

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right and stabilizes looking down the central aisle of the train car, revealing the full length of the interior. Passengers sit on both sides on green benches while one stands holding the overhead rail. Green neon lighting runs continuously overhead, and holographic advertisements glow on the walls as the train continues its journey through the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic metro car that shifts from a focused observation of passengers to a wide view of the train's interior. It begins inside the car bathed in green neon light, moving past passengers on green benches while holographic advertisements glow against a backdrop of dark glass buildings streaming past the windows. As the camera pans left, it passes the bright red neon signage of the Glen North station before centering on a passenger with white spiky cybernetic hair who is examining a device with a chrome arm. The perspective then lingers as the player character reaches out to touch the passenger's cybernetic limb, while the dark urban environment continues to blur outside. Finally, the camera pans right to stabilize down the central aisle, revealing the full length of the car with passengers seated and standing under the steady glow of overhead green neon strips.
